summary: Carbon Pricing Model Iteration 24 - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Carbon listing submission has NO price field (coop only submits quantity), 2) Admin approval REQUIRES price_per_tonne (fails 400 without it), 3) Admin approval WITH price returns premium_distribution object with correct math, 4) Premium math verified: 30% fees, then 70% farmer / 25% GreenLink / 5% coop, 5) simulate-premium endpoint returns correct breakdown, 6) carbon-price GET/PUT endpoints work, 7) Farmer dashboard shows full distribution model with 'Prix de vente aux entreprises RSE'
critical_code_review_comments: carbon_listings.py: CarbonListingCreate model correctly has NO price_per_tonne field - cooperative only submits quantity (lines 49-65)
carbon_listings.py: Admin review endpoint requires price_per_tonne for approval, returns 400 without it (lines 220-225)
carbon_listings.py: calculate_premium_distribution function correctly calculates: total*0.30 fees, then net*0.70/0.25/0.05 for farmer/greenlink/coop
carbon_listings.py: Constants: FEES_RATE=0.30, FARMER_SHARE=0.70, GREENLINK_SHARE=0.25, COOP_SHARE=0.05
carbon_business_model.py: Updated with FEES_RATE=0.30, FARMER_SHARE_RATE=0.70, GREENLINK_MARGIN_RATE=0.25, COOPERATIVE_SHARE_RATE=0.05
carbon_payments_dashboard.py: Uses carbon_config for real admin-set price, returns distribution_model with all fields for farmer users
CreateCarbonListing.jsx: NO price input field, displays 'Le Super Admin fixera le prix de vente' message
AdminCarbonApprovals.jsx: Price input in approval modal with live premium breakdown calculation (30%/70%/25%/5%)
CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: Shows 'Prix de vente aux entreprises RSE' with full distribution table

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed, 1 skipped for cooperative dashboard - by design)

seed_data_creation: Test created carbon listings with TEST_ prefix for verification (TEST_NoPriceSubmit_*, TEST_ApprovalNoPrice_*, TEST_ApprovalWithPrice_*, TEST_PendingPrice_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon pricing model fully verified: 1) Cooperative submits quantity only (no price field), 2) Admin sets price during approval (required), 3) Premium distribution: total * 0.30 fees, then net * 0.70 farmer / 0.25 greenlink / 0.05 coop. The carbon_config collection stores default_price_per_tonne. Farmer dashboard shows 'Prix de vente aux entreprises RSE' with full breakdown. Cooperative dashboard has different structure (no distribution_model - by design).

features_verified.POST /api/carbon-listings/submit (no pri: PASS - Cooperative can submit without price_per_tonne, status=pending_approval
features_verified.PUT /api/carbon-listings/{id}/review (no: PASS - Returns 400 when no price provided for approval
features_verified.PUT /api/carbon-listings/{id}/review (wi: PASS - Returns premium_distribution with correct math
features_verified.GET /api/carbon-listings/simulate-premiu: PASS - Returns correct breakdown for given quantity/price
features_verified.PUT /api/carbon-listings/carbon-price: PASS - Admin can update default price, non-admin gets 403
features_verified.GET /api/carbon-payments/dashboard: PASS - Returns distribution_model for farmer users with price_per_tonne_xof and rates
features_verified.Frontend: CreateCarbonListing.jsx: PASS - NO price input field, message about admin setting price visible
features_verified.Frontend: AdminCarbonApprovals.jsx: PASS - Price input in modal, live premium breakdown (30%/70%/25%/5%), 'Prix à fixer' for pending
features_verified.Frontend: CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: PASS - Shows 'Prix de vente aux entreprises RSE' 15,000 XOF/tonne, full distribution table

premium_distribution_verified.formula: total = price_per_tonne * quantity, fees = total * 0.30, net = total - fees, farmer = net * 0.70, greenlink = net * 0.25, coop = net * 0.05

mocked_api_note: Orange Money payment is still MOCKED as noted in review request
